intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 75%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/15. 5:00 at 90%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 90%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/15. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/15. Power: 90-90%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 15.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/15. Duration: 1:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/15. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/15. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/15. 115% FTP. Keep 88-95 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/15. 5:00 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 90% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 90%, 88-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/15. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 20% into session. 90%, 88-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1:00 at 115%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/15. 11 to go. You've accumulated 11min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/15. You're building something real here. 11 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/15. 3:00 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 27% complete. Rep 5/15. 90% at 88-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/15. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/15. 90% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% for 5:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/15. 5:00 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 37% complete. Rep 6/15. 90% at 82-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 37% through. This is your workout. Own it. 90% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 6/15. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% complete. Rep 6/15. 90% for 5:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 43% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 43% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 43% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. 115% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 90%, 82-90 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 8 of 15. Target: 90% FTP, 82-90 rpm. 7 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 90% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/15. 5:00 at 90%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 5:00. Seated, 82-90 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 51% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 115% FTP × 1:00. After rest, expect 90% for 3min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 51% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 51% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. 115% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 10/15. 42 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 90% for 3:00. Then 5:00 recovery. Execute now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 52% done. 5 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 10/15. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 3:00 at 90%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 56% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 5:00. Then 30min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 56% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 56% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 11/15. 62% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 11. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 11/15. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 4 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. 4 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 11/15. 90% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 68% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 12: 115% FTP. You're 55 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 35 minutes of hard work. You can do 3 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 12/15. Only 3 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 12/15. 115% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 3 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 70% done. 2 intervals left. 19 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 13. 36min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 56 minutes of work done. 19 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 13. 2 to go. 19 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 18 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 14/15. 1:00 at 115%. Cadence: 75-85 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 76% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 1 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 76% into session. 115% at 75-85 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 90% for 3:00. Then 15min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 90% × 3:00. Then 15min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 3:00. Then 15min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 3:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 65 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 81% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 45min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
